data.title: hooks/record-test-status.sh exceeds 1000-line SC (1302 lines)
data.description: record-test-status.sh is 1302 lines, violating the no-source-file->1000-lines SC from epic 0df8-1c8c. Pre-existing at start of epic; not in scope of any story. Extract helper functions (batch processing, progress tracking, centrality analysis) into focused sub-modules in hooks/lib/ to bring under 1000 lines.
